title: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
description: A startup support program offering Azure credits, development tools, technical guidance, and go-to-market resources to eligible early-stage technology companies.
eligibility: Early-stage, privately held startups building software, AI, or technology products in supported regions; additional benefits may require an investor-network referral code.
value: Starter Azure credits are available without a referral code, while approved and investor-referred startups may qualify for expanded credits and additional program benefits under current terms.
